synthetics.canary.s3encryption.Encryptio.Docs: The encryption method to use for artifacts created by this canary. Specify `SSE_S3` to use server-side encryption (SSE) with an Amazon S3-managed key. Specify `SSE-KMS` to use server-side encryption with a customer-managed AWS KMS key.  If you omit this parameter, an AWS-managed AWS KMS key is used.

synthetics.canary.s3encryption.KmsKeyArn.Docs: The ARN of the customer-managed AWS KMS key to use, if you specify `SSE-KMS` for `EncryptionMode`
